title: Creating a burndown chart in work management
excerpt:
Hello! 
We are trying to figure out a way to get a “burndown” chart in Work Management. We have several date columns and statuses that would indicate project “creation” and “completion” but are unable create a good chart…

posts.author: ChrisH2 (Chris)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!

We are trying to figure out a way to get a “burndown” chart in Work Management. We have several date columns and statuses that would indicate project “creation” and “completion” but are unable create a good chart to see burndown for the projects.

Is there a way to build this in the native features?

Thank you in advance!

posts.author: ZakiImtiaz (Zaki | readylogic.co)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @ChrisH2,
you can use a combination of alternative charting methods to achieve similar insights.

For Example:
1.Using a bar or pie chart.
This can give you a snapshot of how much work is done and what’s left.
2.Cumulative Flow Diagram:
It helps you visualize progress and identify bottlenecks.
3.Timeline View: Allows you to see task progress over time, helping you track how far along each project is.
I hope your query gets resolved.

Regards,
Zaki
